as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iGYOiiTcDHd015viENz1-25" value="<div>1. External Interrupt Received.</div><div>2. Informs the Processor.</div><div><div>3. Save and Loads the Currently executing job done by processor.</div></div><div>4. Then PLIC goes and checks the PLIC handler to check which peripheral's interrupt is evoked.</div><div>5. Then the processor goes to ISR to execute the peripherals execution needs.</div><div>6. Then the processor exits from ISR and continue where it was left runnning.<br></div>" style="shape=process;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=0.02564102564102564;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="120" width="390" height="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iGYOiiTcDHd015viENz1-38" value="" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.654;exitY=1.001;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="iGYOiiTcDHd015viENz1-15" target="iGYOiiTcDHd015viENz1-25"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="420" y="259.9999999999999" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="410" y="200" as="targetPoint" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="422" y="210" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 3. Save and Loads the Currently executing job done by processor.
4. Then PLIC goes and checks the PLIC handler to check which peripheral's interrupt is evoked.
5. Then the processor goes to ISR to execute the peripherals execution needs.
6. Then the processor exits from ISR and continue where it was left runnning.
